## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant local checks for this change.
- [ ] I updated docs or confirmed no docs change is needed.
- [ ] I kept the change within the active phase boundary.

## Conventional Commit Title

Use a Conventional Commit title so `.github/workflows/pr-title.yml` passes.

Examples:

- `feat: add ruleset editor shell`
- `fix: tighten release gate status handling`
- `docs: clarify maintainer branch protection settings`
